channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Good News in History, February 24
item.description: 190 years ago today, one of the foremost painters of 19th-century America, Winslow Homer, was born. Born in Boston to a father always seeking to pull ...

item.title: AI Will Never Be Conscious
item.description: In his new book, A World Appears, Michael Pollan argues that artificial intelligence can do many things—it just can’t be a person.

item.title: College Campuses Are in Upheaval Over Faculty Ties to Epstein
item.description: From small art schools to large public universities, the new DOJ release of emails reveals just how deep the financier’s influence in academia went. S...

item.title: Stripe, PayPal Ventures bet on India’s Xflow to fix cross-border B2B payments
item.description: Stripe and PayPal Ventures have participated in Xflow's $16.6 million round that gives it a post-money valuation of $85 million.

item.title: Canva acquires startups working on animation and marketing
item.description: With the new acquisitions, the company wants to bolster its position as a marketing solution by potentially adding video creation and more granular me...

item.title: A Meta AI security researcher said an OpenClaw agent ran amok on her inbox
item.description: The viral X post from an AI security researcher reads like satire. But it's really a word of warning about what can go wrong when handing tasks to an ...

item.title: Tesla’s battle with the California Department of Motor Vehicles isn’t over after all
item.description: Tesla has filed a lawsuit against the California DMV in the ongoing battle around Autopilot.

item.title: The Righteous EV Owners Who Won’t Let Their Broken Cars Die
item.description: Fisker went out of business in 2024, but its biggest fans want to bring the “right to repair” to the masses.

item.title: What travelers should do if they're stranded in Mexico right now
item.description: Here's what travelers should do if they're stranded in Mexico right now.

item.title: How the State Department’s Smart Traveler Enrollment Program could help you on your next trip abroad
item.description: The U.S. Department of State has created the Smart Traveler Enrollment Program to keep you informed about security updates from the nearest U.S. Consu...

item.title: The ultimate guide to Southwest credit card eligibility
item.description: eview current Southwest credit card welcome offers, bonus values, annual fees and key Chase rules before you apply.

item.title: 30 best Marriott hotels in the world that you can book with points
item.description: Calling all Marriott Bonvoy members: These are the world's best Marriott hotels that you can book with points.

item.title: Global Entry still shuttered, travel sector urges 'immediate' restoration
item.description: The Transportation Security Administration plans to keep TSA PreCheck open after reports suggested the fast-tracked lanes could be closed amid the fed...

item.title: Start Your Surround Sound Journey With $50 off This Klipsch Soundbar
item.description: This soundbar is just the beginning, with the option to add wireless bookshelf speakers or a subwoofer.

item.title: Osaka Stunned by Anonymous Gift of Gold Bars to Fix Aging Water Pipes
item.description: Have you seen the price of gold recently? In the Japanese city of Osaka, one man obviously did, and decided to cash in for the sake of his community. ...

item.title: 6 Best Duffel Bags We Tested While Traveling (2026)
item.description: Need to schlep some stuff? Consider these field-tested duffel bags. The Eastpak Duffel Pack S Tarp Black2 is our top pick.

item.title: Infecting Mosquitoes with Natural Bacteria Lowered Dengue Risk by 70% in Citywide Experiment
item.description: A gold-standard scientific trial revealed an existing mosquito control method works not only to reduce insect numbers, but also the diagnoses of dengu...

item.title: Diseased Rhino Recovers After Florida Zoo Team Surprise Locals with Pioneering Veterinary Tactics
item.description: A Florida zoo team recently traveled to Zimbabwe after they were asked to help a white rhino suffering from a parasitic eye infection. They came up wi...

item.title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
item.description: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.

item.title: Man’s Dream About Having Heart Attack Leads to Real-Life Diagnosis and Life-Saving Surgery
item.description: A man who dreamed he died of a heart attack took it as a sign and was soon diagnosed with a dangerous heart condition. Jeremy Schwartz had a “vivid” d...

item.title: Bang Bang Shrimp Pasta

item.description: You guys, Starbucks sells the Strawberry Açaí concentrate in stores! Which means we can make the famous Starbuck’s Pink Drink…

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
